data.content: Planning complete for Codex detail output visibility. Root cause: live Codex JSON-RPC uses params.delta, but Foolery reads params.text and drops real assistant text; commandExecution/outputDelta is listed but untranslated; empty reasoning completions produce '(no text)'. Live evidence is in /home/cartine/.config/foolery/logs/foolery/2026-04-25/term-1777101921516-37ganw.jsonl for foolery-f354. Also observed separate hang: foreground dev server launched under Codex and playwright approval request left thread waitingOnApproval. Next step should implement in a dedicated worktree, mainly src/lib/codex-jsonrpc-session.ts, terminal-manager formatting, and focused tests.
